title: Marketplace Manager - Zappfresh Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zappfresh Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh Advisory Limited:
Zappfresh Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
